name: property managers handling 10-20 properties/month tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 properties/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual spreadsheets and calculations.
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of occupancy and vacancy data
